ai-tinkerers-seattle.notes: Founded by Joe Heitzeberg; first Seattle meetup Nov 2022 drew 12 people. 4,612 local members. Dev Tools Track format.

aicamp-seattle.notes: AICamp global platform (500k+ devs, 50+ cities). Seattle chapter 6,127 Meetup members, 577 past events. Hosts at GitHub Bellevue.

pydata-seattle.notes: Regional chapter of PyData by NumFOCUS (501c3). 4,194 members. 99 past events. Founded by Eloisa.

ai-tinkerers-chicago.notes: Inaugural meetup Oct 4, 2023 in Fulton Market. 1,842 members. Drive Capital hosts and sponsors. 20th meetup reached ~March 2026.

chicago-ml.notes: Founded by Garrett Smith (CEO of Gage). 4,339 members. Self-described longest-running/largest Chicago ML meetup.

chicago-ai.notes: Organized by Adam Betzen (Herzum). 556 members. Part of Herzum's 37-group network.

aicamp-chicago.notes: AICamp Chicago chapter. Events at Microsoft Chicago. Global platform: 500k+ devs.

ai-tinkerers-austin.notes: Inaugural meetup Feb 15, 2024. Named by Alex Graveley (GitHub Copilot creator). 819 members. Hosted at Capital Factory.

austin-langchain-aimug.notes: 2,046 members. Monthly mixers on first Wednesday. Celebrated 2 years in late 2025. Focus on LangChain, LangGraph, Claude Code.

hack-ai-austin.notes: Part of AITX Community. 2,333 Meetup members. Events at Capital Factory. Sponsors: PostHog, NVIDIA.

minneapolis-ai-engineer-meetup.notes: 610 members. Community channel: #minneapolis on AI Engineer / Latent Space Discord.

wild-ai-meetup.notes: Minneapolis's 'raw, edgy AI meetup.' 761 members. Venues: DayBlock Brewing and Improving.

appliedai-minnesota.notes: 501(c)(3) nonprofit. 5,638 members. Founded by Justin Grammens under Emerging Technologies North. Bi-weekly podcast.

twin-cities-ai-for-business.notes: Part of The Global AI Community (64 chapters). 653 members. Microsoft-sponsored.
